시편 11:1.content: In Yahweh, I take refuge. How can you say to my soul, “Flee as a bird to your mountain”?

시편 11:2.content: For, behold, the wicked bend their bows. They set their arrows on the strings, that they may shoot in darkness at the upright in heart.

시편 11:3.content: If the foundations are destroyed, what can the righteous do?

시편 11:4.content: Yahweh is in his holy temple. Yahweh is on his throne in heaven. His eyes observe. His eyes examine the children of men.

시편 11:5.content: Yahweh examines the righteous, but his soul hates the wicked and him who loves violence.

시편 11:6.content: On the wicked he will rain blazing coals; fire, sulfur, and scorching wind shall be the portion of their cup.

시편 11:7.content: For Yahweh is righteous. He loves righteousness. The upright shall see his face.
